## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed code
- [ ] Added changeset (`npx changeset`) if user-facing
